arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford makes England feelings clear after being frozen out of Three Lions setup
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford has 60 England caps to his name but the forward has not featured in a Three Lions squad in months and has not scored for over a year

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank provides Yoane Wissa injury update ahead of Brentford's clash with Man United
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank provides an update on Yoane Wissa's injury recovery ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Fixtures vs form: Are Man Utd ‘flat track bullies’?
arts.sum: United have some excellent fixtures coming up - can it kickstart some form? The post Fixtures vs form: Are Man Utd ‘flat track bullies’? appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm extent of Kobbie Mainoo injury blow
arts.sum: Ahead of facing Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday, United have confirmed that Mainoo will be sidelined for "a few weeks" with a muscle injury. Mainoo has started every Premier League game for United so far this season, underlining his importance to the team following his breakthrough last November and meteoric rise.

arts.ttl: Varane opens up on surprise Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Speaking to L'Equipe, the 2018 World Cup winner has now opened up on his 'eventful' summer, admitting that he planned to continue at Man Utd for longer before realising that 'the club's project didn't suit' him. Man Utd, looking to cut costs, did not trigger the option and Varane left on a free transfer in the summer after the triumph over Man City in the FA Cup final.

arts.ttl: Man United already employ obvious but unlikely Erik ten Hag successor - it's not Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Attention might well be glaring on Ruud van Nistelrooy amid Erik ten Hag's wobbles but Manchester United have another manager option on the bench.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney makes Thomas Tuchel England admission after Manchester United links
arts.sum: Former Man United and England captain Wayne Rooney has had his say on the Three Lions' appointment of Thomas Tuchel after links with the Reds' job if Erik ten Hag leaves

arts.ttl: Man Utd suffer transfer blow as Barcelona join race for top target wanted by Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester United are already making plans for next summer’s transfer window but the Red Devils could be set to lose out to Spanish giants Real Madrid or Barcelona in the race for a Bayern Munich star

arts.ttl: How Manchester United could line-up vs Brentford after Kobbie Mainoo injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester United are battling a number of injury concerns heading into Saturday's 3pm kick-off with Brentford.

arts.ttl: ‘The best’: Paul Pogba says he saw a young player at Manchester United who reminded him of Neymar
arts.sum: Manchester United have produced some incredibly talented players over the past few years. The likes of Kobbie Mainoo, Marcus Rashford and Scott McTominay are all...
